query:
SELECT 
  deliveryCity,
  COUNT(*) as orderCount,
  SUM(teacherFee) as totalTeacherFee,
  SUM(transportFee) as totalTransportFee
FROM orders
WHERE classDate >= '2025-01-01' AND classDate <= '2025-01-31'
GROUP BY deliveryCity
ORDER BY deliveryCity
LIMIT 20;
